@startuml actor Operator participant "«Boundary» MakerUI" as UI #D3D3F0 participant "«Control» Maker" as Control #E6E6FA entity "«Entity» Request" as Req #EEEEE8 entity "«Entity» Passport" as Passp #EEEEFF Operator -> UI : 1: Login\nactivate UI activate UI note right of UI alt
[login invalid] return to operator
X: Print \"Invalid login\"
alt [user exists] loop n times if do Edit passport then pass credentials else print passport endif endloop @enduml
